/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib CMakeFiles/TablePro.dir/TablePro_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TablePro.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o bin/TablePro.app/Contents/MacOS/TablePro -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib  lib/libtablepro_core.a lib/libtablepro_ui.a lib/libtablepro_services.a lib/libtablepro_drivers.a /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib/QtSql.framework/Versions/A/QtSql /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
